description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after the character Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch. The toy features large, rounded blue ears with pink inner linings, a wide mouth with visible white teeth, and big, expressive oval eyes. Its body is predominantly blue with a lighter blue patch on the chest and belly, and darker blue markings on the back and head. The arms are outstretched with small, claw-like fingers, and the legs are short and slightly bent, ending in three-toed feet. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of plush toys, and the overall form is rounded and huggable, with no visible clothing or accessories.
description: A soft, blue plush toy resembling Stitch from Lilo & Stitch, with large ears, a wide mouth, and outstretched arms. The toy has a huggable, rounded body and expressive facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows Stitch's face, wide mouth with teeth, large blue ears with pink interiors, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, protruding nose, and the thickness of the ears and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back markings, tail, and the full span of the ears extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the face, ear, and arm.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and slightly mischievous, with wide, open eyes and a broad mouth displaying small, pointed teeth. The lack of eyebrows and the open mouth give it a friendly, animated look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms outstretched to the sides and legs slightly apart, head facing forward.
